seoTitle: How to Get Started with Slack Connect for Partners
metaDescription: Learn how to set up Slack Connect to work with clients or vendors through shared channels or direct messages without leaving Slack for email.
intro: Working with outside partners often means either a messy email thread or a separate tool just for one client. Slack Connect solves that by letting you invite an external company into a shared channel or a direct one-on-one conversation. This guide covers how to start a Slack Connect channel, send a secure invitation to a partner's email, and manage the approval process from your admin dashboard.

steps.heading: Open Slack Connect from your sidebar
steps.body: Locate the Slack Connect or External Connections option in your left navigation to start the external integration flow.

steps.heading: Choose a shared channel or a direct message
steps.body: Decide whether you need a multi-company shared channel, which can support many organizations, or a simple one-on-one Slack Connect direct message.

steps.heading: Name your channel with a clear external indicator
steps.body: Use a naming convention like ext- or client- so teammates can immediately tell which channels include people outside your company.

steps.heading: Send an invitation to your partner's email
steps.body: Add the external collaborator's corporate email address and include a short personalized note explaining the connection request.

steps.heading: Track pending approvals
steps.body: Monitor your administrative pending grid to see the real-time status of your invitation until your partner accepts.

steps.heading: Confirm the connection works
steps.body: Once connected, start a test huddle or share a project file to make sure both organizations can collaborate smoothly.

faq.question: How many organizations can join one Slack Connect channel?
faq.answer: A shared channel can support a large number of external organizations, though exact limits depend on your plan and workspace settings.

faq.question: Does the other company need a Slack account already?
faq.answer: They need access to a Slack workspace, but Slack Connect invitations guide them through joining or linking their own workspace to the shared channel.

faq.question: Can I remove an external partner from a shared channel later?
faq.answer: Yes, workspace admins can manage and revoke access to shared channels at any time from the administrative settings.

faq.question: Is Slack Connect available on the free plan?
faq.answer: Availability depends on your Slack plan, since some Connect features are limited to paid tiers.
